# bPurple Technology LTD (bpurplehq.org)

> Modern Technology Partner in Africa — Cloud, Data Resilience, AI, Training & Consulting.

## Company Overview
bPurple Technology LTD is a Nigerian technology services company specializing in helping organizations across Africa with digital transformation. We combine enterprise-grade technical solutions with practical workforce training.

**Core Expertise:**
- Cloud Services & Migration (AWS, Azure, Sovereign Cloud)
- Data Storage & Management
- Data Resilience & Backup (Official Veeam Partner)
- Cybersecurity, Privacy & Compliance (NDPR, GDPR, ISO)
- AI & Data Analytics
- Custom Software Development
- Corporate Technology Training & Certification
- IT Consulting & Digital Transformation

## Key Offerings

### Cloud Solutions
- Cloud strategy, migration, and managed services
- Hybrid & multi-cloud architectures
- Cost optimization and governance

### Data Resilience
- Enterprise backup and disaster recovery
- Ransomware protection & rapid recovery
- Hybrid cloud backup strategies
- Compliance-ready solutions

### Training & Workforce Development
- Hands-on technical training programs
- Leadership & digital skills development
- Corporate upskilling and certification preparation
- School of Tech programs

### Other Services
- Custom web & mobile application development
- Data Analytics & Business Intelligence
- Cybersecurity & Compliance consulting
- Talent as a Service (TaaS)

## Website Structure
- **Home**: https://bpurplehq.org
- **Solutions**: https://bpurplehq.org/productsservice/solutions
- **Blog**: https://bpurplehq.org/blog (and /blog/[slug])
- **About**: https://bpurplehq.org/about
- **Contact**: https://bpurplehq.org/contact

## Content Style & Values
- Practical, business-focused insights
- Strong emphasis on African enterprise challenges and opportunities
- Compliance-first approach (especially NDPR)
- Partnership-driven (Veeam and other leading vendors)
- Results-oriented with measurable outcomes

## Target Audience
- Mid-to-large enterprises in Africa
- Organizations undergoing digital transformation
- Companies seeking reliable data protection and recovery
- Businesses investing in workforce development

---

**Last Updated:** June 2026
**Website:** https://bpurplehq.org
**Location:** Nigeria (Africa-focused delivery)
